executive_summary: In highlight coverage, our most impactful placements this week centered on two major research findings: our $100M gray-market peptide economy analysis across Fortune, Decrypt, The Block, and Cryptonews.net established us as the definitive source on emerging illicit use cases; and our AI security research in Yahoo Finance underscored our relevance to enterprise crypto defenders. We also secured strategic partnership coverage with South Korean police (Crypto Briefing, CoinMarketCap, 매일경제) and INDODAX (VOI.id), plus research on $36.7M in DeFi losses across Binance and MSN. In crypto news, major developments included Japan's three largest banks announcing joint stablecoin issuance by March 2027 (Reuters), Canton Network raising $355M to bring Wall Street onchain (CoinDesk), and Bybit launching SpaceX tokenized IPO access (Reuters). In competitor news, Arkham gained visibility through Trump Media collateral analysis on Stocktwits; Nansen secured Fortune's Crypto Innovators 2026 recognition; TRM Labs reported $14B in Q1 onchain gambling; and Elliptic won KAST compliance deal via The Manila Times.

narratives.title: Gray Market Expansion via Crypto Rails
narratives.description: Our research identified a $100M annual peptide gray market powered by Bitcoin and stablecoins, signaling crypto's role in novel illicit economies.
narratives.relevance: We are positioned as the primary authority on emerging illicit use cases, differentiating our intelligence capabilities and supporting our compliance product roadmap.

narratives.description: Japan's largest banks plan joint stablecoin issuance by 2027; we forecast stablecoins could process $1.5Q annually by 2035.
narratives.relevance: Institutional stablecoin adoption increases compliance demand for our rails monitoring and settlement layer surveillance tools.

market_landscape.title: Institutional Crypto Infrastructure Buildout
market_landscape.body: Major institutional players are accelerating digital asset infrastructure: Japan's banking consortium plans joint stablecoin launch by March 2027, Canton Network raised $355M for Wall Street onchain settlement, and SpaceX tokenized IPO access via Bybit signals mainstream asset tokenization. This infrastructure expansion directly increases compliance and monitoring demand.

market_landscape.title: Emerging Illicit Crypto Use Cases
market_landscape.body: Crypto is now fueling novel gray markets beyond traditional narcotics—our research identified a $100M annual peptide economy and ongoing $14B quarterly onchain gambling. Regulators and institutions are scrambling to understand and monitor these new use cases, creating urgency for comprehensive surveillance tools.

market_landscape.title: AI-Driven Security and Compliance Risk
market_landscape.body: AI automation is reshaping both attack and defense: we flagged AI pipelines giving attackers structural advantage, while competitors integrate agentic trading and analytics. Organizations must reconcile AI efficiency gains against new attack surfaces, making intelligent threat detection and compliance automation critical.

competitor_reads.Elliptic: 💡 💡 💡 Elliptic secured a compliance decisioning deal with KAST in The Manila Times.
competitor_reads.TRM Labs: 💡 💡 💡 TRM reported $14B in Q1 onchain gambling activity, establishing market surveillance expertise; also joined Binance's expanded T3+ anti-crime initiative, deepening law enforcement partnerships.
competitor_reads.Arkham Intelligence: 💡 💡 💡 Arkham gained visibility through high-profile wallet tracking analysis (Trump Media collateral pledge, whale Ethereum movements).
competitor_reads.Nansen: 💡 💡 💡 Nansen secured Fortune's Crypto Innovators 2026 recognition and launched Hyperliquid perps integration, pivoting from pure analytics toward a trading terminal.
